newsletters.title: Google wants Search to do the work
newsletters.content:
~[Sign up](https://www.theaivalley.com/)~~ | ~~[Follow us on X](https://twitter.com/heyBarsee)~~ | ~~[Sponsor](mailto:barsee@aivalley.ai)~

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c167fb98-39eb-42d4-a114-56fe02753cac/2__1_-min__2_-min.png?t=1744033912)
Follow image link: (https://www.theaivalley.com/subscribe)
Caption: 

Together with

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/796679f5-2c3c-4cbe-8ab9-5330ed3a3b5b/viktor_logo_top__1_.png?t=1784298940)
Follow image link: (https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main5)
Caption: 



----------
howdy, it’s Barsee again.

happy friday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.

**here are the biggest things worth knowing today:**

* Open-source AI is catching up to the industry's best models

* Google wants Search to become your AI assistant

* Roblox wants AI to build your next game

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

Let’s _dive_ into the Valley of AI…


----------

----------
#### **VIKTOR**

## [Stop reading about AI. Hire it.](https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main5)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/2d016a44-7ff0-4523-bdef-55d2f5848850/aivalley_main_1280x720__1_.jpg?t=1784298958)
Follow image link: (https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main5)
Caption: Courtesy: Viktor

Viktor is an AI employee that works inside Slack and Microsoft Teams. You don't prompt it, you give it a job: build the weekly revenue report, chase overdue invoices, update the CRM, ship the landing page. It connects to 3,200+ tools you already use, runs the work end to end, and posts the finished result back in the channel. No dashboards to check, no new app to learn.

40,000+ teams have already hired one. Alpha Signal, one of the biggest AI newsletters, automated 18 workflows in 67 days with no developer. Hampton budgeted $440K for three hires; 44 days after installing Viktor, none of those hires were on the calendar.

No demo calls, no onboarding project. Start free with $100 in credits, no credit card needed.

[Start free. $100 in credits →](https://ref.viktor.com/vik-aiv-main5)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/944977d2-5127-4058-9d93-c2554cd3f83d/image_-_2026-07-17T200457.260__1_.png?t=1784298724)
Caption: Courtesy: Moonshot AI

**1/ Open-source AI is catching up to the industry's best models: **Moonshot AI just released [Kimi K3](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k3), a 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weights model with a 1 million-token context window, built for coding, reasoning, research, and long-horizon agent workflows. Early benchmarks place it alongside frontier models like Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol, while outperforming them on several coding and software engineering tasks ([Kimi K3 announcement](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k3))

**2/ Google wants Search to become your AI assistant:** Google is rolling out [connected apps](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/connected-apps) in AI Mode, allowing users to link services like Instacart, Canva, and YouTube Music so Search can perform actions across them. The update moves Google closer to turning Search into an AI assistant that can complete everyday tasks instead of simply returning links. ([Read the announcement](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/connected-apps))

**3/ Roblox wants AI to build your next game:** The company unveiled [Build](https://about.roblox.com/newsroom/2026/07/build-without-limits-on-roblox), an AI-powered creation tool that turns text prompts into playable 3D games complete with environments, characters, gameplay mechanics, visuals, and sound. Users can refine projects in Roblox Studio before publishing, marking a major step toward making game development accessible to millions of creators. ([Read the announcement](https://about.roblox.com/newsroom/2026/07/build-without-limits-on-roblox))


----------

----------
# TRENDING TOOLS


--------------------
* [Aidan](https://x.com/Nim_Ravid1/status/2077785419912188236?s=20) > The newest AI employee. The first computer-using AI built for real-time conversations

* [Lucy 2.5](https://x.com/DecartAI/status/2077801728213156044?s=20) > The most advanced Live AI model yet. Edit videos in real time with greater control and new capabilities

* [Kimi K3](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k3) > Moonshot AI's powerful new open-source foundation model

* [Pluto](https://x.com/sahil_seth/status/2077793233653158168?s=20) > Learns your story in just 10 minutes, makes you discoverable to AI agents, and connects you with the right people

* [Bolt Slides](https://x.com/boltdotnew/status/2077770386444341332?s=20) > Lets any AI agent, including Claude Code, Codex, and Bolt, create presentation slides that were previously impossible

* [Google Vids](https://x.com/GoogleWorkspace/status/2077786086974140732?s=20) > Swap backgrounds, adjust lighting, and clean up messy footage instantly using a simple text prompt

* [Fastlane](https://x.com/UseFastlane/status/2077968600200294801?s=20) > Enter your website and instantly generate thousands of viral videos to promote your product


----------

----------
# WHAT I'M CONSUMING


--------------------
* [xAI](https://www.reuters.com/legal/litigation/musks-xai-sues-grok-user-over-sexualized-deepfakes-2026-07-15/?utm_source=www.theneurondaily.com&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=kimi-k3-goes-open) sued a Grok user over sexualized deepfakes, testing how model companies may pursue misuse


----------

----------
# THE VALLEY GEMS


--------------------
__What’s trending on social today:__

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/995b5fe3-daa7-4aa9-a981-d6ef2869fea1/FireShot_Capture_2258_-__4__X_-__x.com___1_.png?t=1784297922)
Caption: 


----------

----------
# THAT’S ALL FOR TODAY


--------------------
Thank you for reading today’s edition. That’s all for today’s issue.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e1f6264a-ca6c-46cf-ab92-be1134d19541/funny-my-favorite-dog-gifs-16__1_.gif?t=1715766102)

newsletters.content:

Follow image link: (https://www.theaivalley.com/subscribe)
Caption: 

Together with

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3ae28aeb-8577-4fec-98db-08973ca638b6/Logo__3_.png?t=1784214098)
Follow image link: (https://fandf.co/4wHy7iP)
Caption: 



----------
howdy, it’s Barsee again.

happy thursday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.

**here are the biggest things worth knowing today:**

* Mira Murati's startup just unveiled its first flagship AI model

* OpenAI just launched its first AI hardware device

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

Let’s _dive_ into the Valley of AI…


----------

----------
#### **JIRA**

## [Give your agents a plan. Not a prompt. New Jira + Teamwork Graph Agent Innovation](https://fandf.co/4wHy7iP)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8a636e96-a906-409a-96d4-1157aa68d01e/1280x720__1_.png?t=1784214014)
Follow image link: (https://fandf.co/4wHy7iP)
Caption: Courtesy: Atlassian Jira

Atlassian's new Jira capabilities centralize planning, orchestrating, and scaling agentic work across the entire software development life cycle. Assign tasks to Claude, Cursor, or GitHub Copilot directly from Jira (with Codex coming soon). Your work stays grounded in Jira, a single source of truth, providing context for agent responses.

Gain complete agent visibility locally and in the cloud with Atlassian’s Teamwork Graph**. **Store permission-aware session records, all while Teamwork Graph CLI hooks continuously update Jira with local session context to keep your teams aligned.

Increase productivity and accelerate planning with other new tools, too. Jira for Slack turns conversations into specs or assigns tasks. AI Planner drives spec-driven development in Confluence. And the Jira Coding Agent uses enterprise context and code intelligence to turn work items into ready-to-review pull requests, enabling fixes directly within Jira.

Assign work to any agent. Measure the impact. [Learn more](https://fandf.co/4wHy7iP).

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/39e8521a-3a9d-4f28-8a7b-482fb4399ea3/cover-social-inkling-post__1_.png?t=1784213889)
Caption: Courtesy: Thinking Machines Lab

**1/ Mira Murati's startup just unveiled its first flagship AI model:** Thinking Machines Lab released [Inkling](https://thinkingmachines.ai/news/introducing-inkling/), an open-weights multimodal model with a 1 million-token context window built for reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows. The company says Inkling rivals leading open models while using significantly fewer tokens, giving developers a powerful foundation they can fully customize and self-host.

**2/ OpenAI just launched its first AI hardware device:** The company unveiled[ Codex Micro](https://openai.com/supply/co-lab/work-louder), a $230 programmable keypad built with Work Louder that lets developers control coding agents through dedicated keys, a joystick, and customizable commands. While designed for a niche audience, the launch offers an early glimpse into OpenAI's broader hardware ambitions ahead of its upcoming consumer AI devices.


----------

----------
# TRENDING TOOLS


--------------------
* [Pocket](https://x.com/AkshayNarisetti/status/2077439335130124544?s=20) > Take notes in the real world

* [Reframe](https://x.com/reve/status/2077467417736036502?s=20) > Expand any image or zoom into the details in any aspect ratio

* [Oak](https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/15/backed-by-60m-in-funding-oak-steps-out-of-stealth-to-fix-the-identity-mess-that-ai-agents-are-making-worse/?utm_source=www.theneurondaily.com&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=chatgpt-may-get-a-body) > Gives companies an identity control plane to manage humans, apps, and AI agents

* [Inkling](https://thinkingmachines.ai/news/introducing-inkling) > Thinking Machines launches its open-weight AI model


----------

----------
# WHAT I'M CONSUMING


--------------------
* The [twilight](https://www.oneusefulthing.org/p/the-twilight-of-the-chatbots) of the chatbots

* How OpenAI's Sol finally learned [design taste](https://notes.designarena.ai/how-openais-sol-finally-learned-design-taste)


----------

----------
# THE VALLEY GEMS


--------------------
__What’s trending on social today:__

----------

----------
# THAT’S ALL FOR TODAY


--------------------

newsletters.title: The Case Against Skills
newsletters.content:
Use them intentionally, or they could make your AI worse  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIENhc2UgQWdhaW5zdCBTa2lsbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzQ0LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MH0=

Context Window

https://every.


THE CASE AGAINST SKILLS https://every.


USE THEM INTENTIONALLY, OR THEY COULD MAKE YOUR AI WORSE https://every.

by Laura Entis https://every.

Midjourney/Every illustration.

Was this newsletter forwarded to you? Sign up https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIENhc2UgQWdhaW5zdCBTa2lsbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzQ0LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9hY2NvdW50IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjV9 to get it in your inbox.



----------------------------------------




SIGNAL

SKILLS COULD BE MAKING YOUR AI WORSE

It might be time to examine your elaborate skill library. Skills are reusable packages of instructions—and sometimes examples and tools—that load whenever they’re relevant to what you asked your AI to do. They’re supposed to improve an agent’s performance. The format, popularized by Anthropic https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIENhc2UgQWdhaW5zdCBTa2lsbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzQ0LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hbnRocm9waWMuc2tpbGxqYXIuY29tL2ludHJvZHVjdGlvbi10by1hZ2VudC1za2lsbHMiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Nn0=, is all over X, where sprawling custom skill libraries are treated as status symbols https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIENhc2UgQWdhaW5zdCBTa2lsbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzQ0LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9oZXluYXZ0b29yL3N0YXR1cy8yMDM2ODYxMjgwODU5MTI0MTAwIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjd9.

Mike Taylor https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIENhc2UgQWdhaW5zdCBTa2lsbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzQ0LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9AbWlrZV8yMTE0IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjh9, Every’s head of tech consulting, thinks every skill should earn its place in your library with proof it improves outcomes. His argument: Frontier models are smart enough that they’ve absorbed the need for most of the skills trending on social media. If a model can reason through something on its own—and Fable 5 https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIENhc2UgQWdhaW5zdCBTa2lsbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzQ0LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9zZWFyY2g_cXVlcnk9ZmFibGUiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6OX0= or GPT-5.6 https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIENhc2UgQWdhaW5zdCBTa2lsbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzQ0LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9jaGFpbi1vZi10aG91Z2h0L2hvdy1ncHQtNS02LWNoYW5nZXMta25vd2xlZGdlLXdvcmsiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTB9 likely can—adding extra instructions creates confusion, not clarity. “You’re fighting the weights of the model by forcing it to do things your way instead of the way it was trained,” Mike says. Any time you conflict with the model’s training, it’s more likely to make mistakes. All the additional text loaded from your skill will also inflate costs, so you should make sure each skill you choose is worth it.

Skills https://every. are still useful, Mike says, but only when you need the model to complete a workflow in a specific way, like producing a custom PowerPoint template https://every. with instructions on your brand style guide or referencing internal company data. Mike recently found when testing Fable 5 that some of the skills Opus 4.8 https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIENhc2UgQWdhaW5zdCBTa2lsbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzQ0LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by92aWJlLWNoZWNrL29wdXMtNC04LXZpYmVjaGVjayIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxM30= needed to avoid mistakes actually harmed the newer model’s performance https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIENhc2UgQWdhaW5zdCBTa2lsbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzQ0LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by92aWJlLWNoZWNrL2FudGhyb3BpYy1teXRob3Mtb3VyLWZhYmxlLXZpYmUtY2hlY2siLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTR9. It reminded Mike of his work as a prompt engineer in 2023: “With GPT-3 we had to use all these hacks and magic words to get it to produce valid code. Then when GPT-4 came out, it followed instructions better, and our bag of tricks was no longer necessary.”

WHY IT MATTERS:

The data backs him up. SWE-Skills-Bench https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIENhc2UgQWdhaW5zdCBTa2lsbHMiLCJwb3N0X2lkIjo0MzQ0LCJwb3N0X3R5cGUiOiJwb3N0IiwidXJsIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hcnhpdi5vcmcvYWJzLzI2MDMuMTU0MDEiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTV9, a research benchmark that tests whether agent skills make agents better at software engineering, tested 49 public software-engineering skills and found that 39 didn’t impact performance, while three made things worse. At the same time, a large percentage of skills caused the model to consume more compute without improving results. (The worst offender increased token use by 451 percent.)

Only seven skills improved outcomes, and according to the researchers, these successful skills all provided specialized guidance the model couldn’t otherwise supply, like financial-risk formulas or traffic-

newsletters.title: Surf the Models with Every’s Biz Ops Team
newsletters.content:
Plus: Granola’s founder on why starting a company is a 'knife fight,' AI enters the C-suite, and who we’re following on X  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3VyZiB0aGUgTW9kZWxzIHdpdGggRXZlcnnigJlzIEJpeiBPcHMgVGVhbSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDMsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvLyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjowfQ==

Context Window

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3VyZiB0aGUgTW9kZWxzIHdpdGggRXZlcnnigJlzIEJpeiBPcHMgVGVhbSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDMsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2NvbnRleHQtd2luZG93IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjF9


SURF THE MODELS WITH EVERY’S BIZ OPS TEAM https://every.


PLUS: GRANOLA’S FOUNDER ON WHY STARTING A COMPANY IS A 'KNIFE FIGHT,' AI ENTERS THE C-SUITE, AND WHO WE’RE FOLLOWING ON X https://every.

by Laura Entis https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3VyZiB0aGUgTW9kZWxzIHdpdGggRXZlcnnigJlzIEJpeiBPcHMgVGVhbSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDMsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BsYXVyYV8yN2JiYWZfMSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo0fQ==

Midjourney/Every illustration.

AI models have never been smarter https://every. or more capable https://every.. But using them to their full potential still requires AI skills, fluency, and most of all, the willingness to hand over complex work to an agent—or agents. Today, we show how our business operations team works across Fable https://every., Codex https://every., and the customer support platform Fin, then look at Granola’s plan to turn meetings into context any agent can use. We also explain why Sonnet 5 https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3VyZiB0aGUgTW9kZWxzIHdpdGggRXZlcnnigJlzIEJpeiBPcHMgVGVhbSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDMsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL3ZpYmUtY2hlY2svc29ubmV0LTUiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6OX0= still isn’t great at writing (but does better at more tightly scoped tasks), examine three roles emerging in the AI era, and share some of our favorite people to follow on X.

Was this newsletter forwarded to you? Sign up https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3VyZiB0aGUgTW9kZWxzIHdpdGggRXZlcnnigJlzIEJpeiBPcHMgVGVhbSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDMsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2FjY291bnQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTB9 to get it in your inbox.



----------------------------------------




INSIDE EVERY

BIZ OPS AT THE FRONTIER

Executive operations manager Jalaiyah Bolden https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3VyZiB0aGUgTW9kZWxzIHdpdGggRXZlcnnigJlzIEJpeiBPcHMgVGVhbSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDMsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5saW5rZWRpbi5jb20vaW4vamFsYWl5YWgtYm9sZGVuLyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxMX0= had a couple of days to turn around a customer-support plan for the launch of Every All Access https://every., a new annual membership for builders that includes unlimited access to Every products, among other perks https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiU3VyZiB0aGUgTW9kZWxzIHdpdGggRXZlcnnigJlzIEJpeiBPcHMgVGVhbSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDMsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2J1aWxkZXItcGFjaz9zb3VyY2U9cG9zdF9idXR0b24iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTN9. The information she needed was scattered across half a dozen sources. “It was information overload,” she says—the kind that could have sunk much bigger ops teams.

Instead of scrambling, Jalaiyah took a deep breath and surfed the models https://every..

https://every.’s initial Fable prompt. (Screenshot courtesy of Jalaiyah Bolden.)




First, she summoned Fable. Giving the model access to all relevant context, she instructed it to ask clarifying questions about anything that was missing, and then get to work.

Fable audited Slack channels and read the Notion https://every. documents and meeting transcripts. It

newsletters.title: Apple vs. OpenAI
newsletters.content:
~[Sign up](https://www.theaivalley.com/)~~ | ~~[Follow us on X](https://twitter.com/heyBarsee)~~ | ~~[Sponsor](mailto:barsee@aivalley.ai)~

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c167fb98-39eb-42d4-a114-56fe02753cac/2__1_-min__2_-min.png?t=1744033912)
Follow image link: (https://www.theaivalley.com/subscribe)
Caption: 

Together with

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/530680bc-0d72-4014-acc0-090de8866880/Wispr_Flow_Logo__2___1___1_.png?t=1774963064)
Follow image link: (https://ref.wisprflow.ai/aivalley)
Caption: 



----------
howdy, it’s Barsee again.

happy wednesday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.

**here are the biggest things worth knowing today:**

* OpenAI's first AI device won't have a screen

* Apple is suing OpenAI for stealing trade secrets

* Cursor may be building an AI coworker for office work

* The team behind the viral AI 2027 forecast now wants to slow AI down

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

Let’s _dive_ into the Valley of AI…


----------

----------
#### **WISPR FLOW**

## [Speak naturally. Send without fixing.](https://ref.wisprflow.ai/aivalley)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/717a3459-ec60-4a52-ac21-23904bc17c96/Newsletter_Hero_AndroidLaunch__11_.png?t=1784125205)
Follow image link: (https://ref.wisprflow.ai/aivalley)
Caption: Courtesy: Wispr Flow

Wispr Flow turns your voice into ready-to-send text in any app. Give coding agents 10x more context by speaking instead of typing. Works in Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT, and every IDE.

89% of messages sent with zero edits. Millions of users worldwide. Available on Mac, Windows, iPhone, and now Android.

[Try Flow Free](https://ref.wisprflow.ai/aivalley)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/841a2d90-77a8-409d-ad85-142b912cc910/2000x1500__2_.png?t=1784125635)
Caption: Courtesy: OpenAI

**1/ OpenAI's first AI device won't have a screen:** A new [report](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-07-14/openai-s-first-device-will-be-moveable-screenless-speaker-built-as-ai-companion?accessToken=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzb3VyY2UiOiJTdWJzY3JpYmVyR2lmdGVkQXJ0aWNsZSIsImlhdCI6MTc4NDA4ODA1MCwiZXhwIjoxNzg0NjkyODUwLCJhcnRpY2xlSWQiOiJUSTYwSllUOU5KTFMwMCIsImJjb25uZWN0SWQiOiIwOThFNzNDQTE5QTA0RDkxODEyQzQ4MjcwRDZERTI0QiJ9._rkU6NkgUQgHrF54hXy1eiYrgcs2CrxZHS4EwzYNRCI&utm_source=tldrnewsletter&leadSource=uverify%20wall) claims Jony Ive and OpenAI are developing a screen-free, battery-powered AI speaker with onboard cameras, sensors, and GPT-powered voice interactions. Powered by ChatGPT, the device is expected to proactively assist users, control smart-home devices, answer questions, and develop a more natural, human-like relationship over time.

**2/ Apple is suing OpenAI for stealing trade secrets:** The company filed a [lawsuit](http://documentcloud.org/documents/28453229-apple-v-openai/) alleging former Apple employees, including OpenAI's Chief Hardware Officer Tang Tan, improperly used confidential information related to unreleased products, designs, and manufacturing technologies. The legal battle comes as OpenAI accelerates its hardware ambitions following its $6.5 billion acquisition of Jony Ive's AI device startup, io.

**3/ Cursor may be building an AI coworker for office work: **[Reports](https://www.pymnts.com/news/artificial-intelligence/2026/cursor-prepares-workplace-ai-agent-to-challenge-claude-cowork-and-chatgpt-work/) suggest the company is developing "Sand," a general-purpose AI agent designed to handle emails, spreadsheets, messaging, and engineering tasks beyond coding. If confirmed, it would position Cursor to compete more directly with workplace AI products from OpenAI and Anthropic.

**4/ The team behind the viral AI 2027 forecast now wants to slow AI down: **The AI Futures Project published "[AI 2040: Plan A](https://blog.aifutures.org/p/ai-2040-plan-a)," a proposal calling for the U.S. and China to delay superintelligence through a verified international agreement on AI research transparency and compute oversight. The authors argue that a slower path to AI could reduce the risks of catastrophic misuse and unchecked concentration of power, though they estimate the plan has only a 3 to 15% chance of becoming reality.


----------

----------
# TRENDING TOOLS


--------------------
* [Screenpipe](https://x.com/screenpipe/status/2077045452579778664?s=20) > Records everything you do on your computer and turns it into a searchable memory, automatically generating SOPs, documentation, and AI agents from the way you work

* [HeyClicky](https://www.heyclicky.com/try) > Lives next to your cursor and sees what you see. Simply ask a question out loud, and it guides you through whatever you're working on in real time

* [ChatCut](https://chatcut.io/) > An AI-powered video editor that works directly inside ChatGPT, on desktop, and on the web

* [Claude for Teachers](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-for-teachers) > A free version of Claude designed specifically for educators, with built-in lesson planning and teaching tools

* [AgentKey](https://agentkey.app/) > Gives your AI agent a single integration for live web search, X, Reddit, YouTube, and on-chain data, allowing it to answer questions with real-time information instead of running into paywalls

* [GPT-Live](https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/08/openai-releases-new-voice-models-for-more-natural-live-conversations/) > A full-duplex voice system that listens and speaks simultaneously, enabling natural interruptions, live translation, and human-like backchannel responses such as "mhmm."

* [Sim](https://www.sim.ai/) > An open source AI workspace where teams can build, deploy, and manage custom AI agents

* [Google](https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/14/google-images-gets-a-pinterest-like-redesign-focused-on-discovery) > Users can now generate AI images directly within Google Search


----------

----------
# WHAT I'M CONSUMING


--------------------
* [Prompting guidance](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/prompt-guidance-gpt-5p6) for GPT-5.6 Sol

* You just [hired](https://www.a16z.news/p/the-next-ai-goldrush-tokens-loops) a million bad employees**. **AI was supposed to replace human labor, but it has done the opposite

* OpenAI, Anthropic employees [could buy ~1/3](https://www.redfin.com/news/openai-anthropic-housing-wealth) of all homes in SF with IPO earnings

* Thinking Machines says the [future worth building](https://thinkingmachines.ai/blog/the-future-worth-building-is-human/) is human

* Anthropic gives teachers [free access](https://9to5mac.com/2026/07/14/anthropic-is-giving-teachers-free-access-to-premium-claude-features-details-here/?utm_source=thedeepview&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=demis-hassabis-outlines-ambitious-ai-safety-plan) to premium Claude features 

* Anthropic has extended free [Claude Fable 5 access](https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/artificial-intelligence/claude-fable-5-stays-free-for-paid-users-until-july-19-as-anthropic-buys-more-time/) for paid subscribers a second time in one week (now through July 19)

* Zhipu AI founder outlines a path to[ fully automated](https://x.com/bingxu_/status/2075961011816092158) no-person companies

* OpenAI is [trying to rip](https://archive.is/czWjG) our screens away with its new device


----------

----------
# THE VALLEY GEMS


--------------------
__What’s trending on social today:__

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d3ecbcc9-4104-437e-b930-093a7420e7b7/FireShot_Capture_2253_-__4__Farza_

newsletters.title: The Urge to Merge (ChatGPT and Codex)
newsletters.content:
Power users revolt at OpenAI’s tool combination. Plus: The battle for knowledge-work OS, managing agents with Fable, and a 53 percent error-rate drop  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIFVyZ2UgdG8gTWVyZ2UgKENoYXRHUFQgYW5kIENvZGV4KSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvLyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjowfQ==

Context Window

https://every.


THE URGE TO MERGE (CHATGPT AND CODEX) https://every.


POWER USERS REVOLT AT OPENAI’S TOOL COMBINATION. PLUS: THE BATTLE FOR KNOWLEDGE-WORK OS, MANAGING AGENTS WITH FABLE, AND A 53 PERCENT ERROR-RATE DROP https://every.

by Katie Parrott https://every.

Midjourney/Every illustration.

After OpenAI released GPT-5.6 Sol https://every. on Thursday, Anthropic reset Claude’s five-hour and weekly usage allowances for all users, presumably to give people more time to use Fable https://every. before it leaves Claude plans and moves to the API. Some saw the move as a bid to keep users from defecting to OpenAI’s hot new model. Thibault “Tibo” Sottiaux of the Codex and ChatGPT team quote-posted Anthropic’s announcement https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIFVyZ2UgdG8gTWVyZ2UgKENoYXRHUFQgYW5kIENvZGV4KSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3guY29tL3Roc290dGlhdXgvc3RhdHVzLzIwNzUyODcxMDg2ODA2MDE5MjkiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6N30= with three words: “I smell fear.”

OpenAI and Anthropic are fighting to become the home for agentic knowledge work. OpenAI is merging Codex into ChatGPT https://every.. Anthropic is adding a browser to Claude Code https://every. and extending Fable access https://every.. Power users mix labs anyway. Today we bring you the merge drama, a workflow that puts Fable in charge of cheaper models, and the upside of our model parents fighting: Christmas in July

While we have you: Today we’re launching Every All Access https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIFVyZ2UgdG8gTWVyZ2UgKENoYXRHUFQgYW5kIENvZGV4KSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2J1aWxkZXItcGFjayIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxMX0=, a new $525 annual membership that sits above the current Member tier and bundles unlimited access to all five Every products with the Goodie Bag—curated partner discounts from Cursor, Notion, Framer, Anthropic, PostHog, and others.

Learn about All Access https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIFVyZ2UgdG8gTWVyZ2UgKENoYXRHUFQgYW5kIENvZGV4KSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL29uLWV2ZXJ5L2ludHJvZHVjaW5nLWV2ZXJ5LWFsbC1hY2Nlc3M_c291cmNlPXBvc3RfYnV0dG9uIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjEyfQ==

If you’re already a Member, you can upgrade now at every.to/subscribe https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIFVyZ2UgdG8gTWVyZ2UgKENoYXRHUFQgYW5kIENvZGV4KSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL3N1YnNjcmliZSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxM30=.

Was this newsletter forwarded to you? Sign up https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIFVyZ2UgdG8gTWVyZ2UgKENoYXRHUFQgYW5kIENvZGV4KSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2FjY291bnQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTR9 to get it in your inbox.



----------------------------------------




SIGNAL

CODEX IS DEAD. LONG LIVE CODEX.

OpenAI found out how much people loved Codex by renaming it ChatGPT.

Five months after releasing Codex as a standalone app https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIFVyZ2UgdG8gTWVyZ2UgKENoYXRHUFQgYW5kIENvZGV4KSIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQzNDEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL3ZpYmUtY2hlY2svY29kZXgtdmliZS1jaGVjayIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNX0=, OpenAI folded it into the new ChatGPT desktop app https://every. last week and relabeled the previous ChatGPT app “ChatGPT Classic.” The new app has three modes: Chat for questions, Work for longer assign
